description.en: Numerical underflow with result rounded to zero. Occurs when a subnormal result is pushed to zero by rounding. Inexact and Subnormal are also signaled.

excerpt.es: Numerical underflow with result rounded to zero. Occurs when a subnormal result is pushed to zero by rounding. Inexact and Subnormal are also signaled.
excerpt.en: Numerical underflow with result rounded to zero. Occurs when a subnormal result is pushed to zero by rounding. Inexact and Subnormal are also signaled.
